grant_title: Sustainability grants awarded to NJ schools
geographic_restrictions: New Jersey public schools and districts
project_area: Sustainability projects in schools (e.g., aquaponics systems, outdoor classrooms, waste reduction programs, gardens, water bottle refilling stations, tree planting, composting initiatives, mindfulness programs, green team capacity building)
demographic_requirements: Open to all New Jersey public schools and districts, with some projects emphasizing inclusivity for students with special needs or socioeconomic disadvantages
eligibility_summary: New Jersey public schools and school districts are eligible to apply for grants to fund sustainability projects. Projects must align with Sustainable Jersey for Schools program goals, including reducing environmental impact, promoting health and wellness, and fostering environmental education. Some grants prioritize projects that support inclusive learning environments or serve disadvantaged student populations.
